html:
Exclusive to:

Shears are a tool exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. They can be crafted in the Tools Tab using 2 Twigs and 2 Iron Ore. They can be used to trim a variety of things, including:

  • Tall Grass, giving two Cut Grass
  • Hedges, giving two Clippings
  • Hanging Vine, giving a Rope
  • Creeping Vine, 3 clips to open a ruin and 2 clips each to open doors inside
  • Spear Traps, destroying it

The main benefits of Shears are the increased yield and decreased harvesting time when used compared to a Machete and Razor.

Shears are more effective than its counterparts:

  • Tallgrass - Shears clip once and give two cut grass, a machete strikes 3 times for 1 cut grass.
  • Hedges - Shears give two clippings, a razor gives one clippings but the razor has infinite durability.
  • Creeping vines - Shears clip 3 times for outside vines and 2 times for inside vines, a machete strikes 12 times for outside vines and 4 times for inside vines.

The materials for crafting shears are renewable. The shears are also obtainable from trawling in the Lily Ponds with a small chance(1.96%).

Shipwrecked

If bought from a connected Hamlet world, they can be used to shear things including:

  • Bamboo Patch, giving two Bamboo
  • Viney Bush, giving two Vines
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"shears"
“Shearly delightful.”
–Wilson
“Not as good as fire, but I guess it has its uses.”
–Willow
“Is for cutting plant things.”
–Wolfgang
“Can it shear my heart?”
–Wendy
“I WILL DEFEAT SOME VEGETATION WITH THIS!”
–WX-78
“A useful tool for horticultural purposes.”
–Wickerbottom
“Don't get jealous, Lucy.”
–Woodie
“Aren't there gardeners for this sort of thing?”
–Maxwell
“Cutting implements constructed from raw metal.”
–Wagstaff
“Tis a weapön tö use against a mighty hedge!”
–Wigfrid
“It's for chores like trimming hedges or cutting grass.”
–Webber
“What am I supposed to do with these?”
–Walani
“Good for cutting hedges and grass.”
–Warly
“A cutlass fer tha'bushes.”
–Woodlegs
“FOR THE CUTTINGS OF THE SHRUBS.”
–Wilba
“For hair cuts”
–Wormwood
“Time to do some yard work.”
–Wheeler
Shears are a tool exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. They can be crafted in the Tools Tab using 2 Twigs and 2 Iron Ore. They can be used to trim a variety of things, including:
Tall Grass, giving two Cut Grass
Hedges, giving two Clippings
Hanging Vine, giving a Rope
Creeping Vine, 3 clips to open a ruin and 2 clips each to open doors inside
Spear Traps, destroying it
The main benefits of Shears are the increased yield and decreased harvesting time when used compared to a Machete and Razor.
Shears are more effective than its counterparts:
Tallgrass - Shears clip once and give two cut grass, a machete strikes 3 times for 1 cut grass.
Hedges - Shears give two clippings, a razor gives one clippings but the razor has infinite durability.
Creeping vines - Shears clip 3 times for outside vines and 2 times for inside vines, a machete strikes 12 times for outside vines and 4 times for inside vines.
The materials for crafting shears are renewable. The shears are also obtainable from trawling in the Lily Ponds with a small chance(1.96%).
Shipwrecked[edit | edit source]
If bought from a connected Hamlet world, they can be used to shear things including:
Bamboo Patch, giving two Bamboo
Viney Bush, giving two Vines

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Kéo là một công cụ độc quyền trong Hamlet DLC. Chúng có thể được chế tạo trong Thẻ Công Cụ bằng cách sử dụng 2 Cành Cây và 2 Quặng Sắt. Chúng có thể được sử dụng để cắt nhiều thứ khác nhau, bao gồm:
title: Shears

'''Shears '''are a tool exclusive to the ''[[Hamlet]] '' DLC. They can be crafted in the [[Tools Tab]] using 2 [[Twigs]] and 2 [[Iron Ore]]. They can be used to trim a variety of things, including:
* [[Tall Grass]], giving two [[Cut Grass]]
* [[Hedge]]s, giving two [[Clippings]]
* [[Hanging Vine]], giving a [[Rope]]
* [[Creeping Vines|Creeping Vine]], 3 clips to open a ruin and 2 clips each to open doors inside
* [[Nasty Spear Trap|Spear Traps]], destroying it

The main benefits of Shears are the increased yield and decreased harvesting time when used compared to a [[Machete]] and [[Razor]].

Shears are more effective than its counterparts:
* Tallgrass - Shears clip once and give two cut grass, a machete strikes 3 times for 1 cut grass.
* Hedges - Shears give two clippings, a razor gives one clippings but the razor has infinite durability.
* Creeping vines - Shears clip 3 times for outside vines and 2 times for inside vines, a machete strikes 12 times for outside vines and 4 times for inside vines.

The materials for crafting shears are renewable. The shears are also obtainable from trawling in the [[Lily Pond|Lily Ponds]] with a small chance(1.96%).

=={{Pic|32|Shipwrecked icon}} Shipwrecked==
If bought from a connected Hamlet world, they can be used to shear things including:
* [[Bamboo Patch]], giving two [[Bamboo]]
* [[Viney Bush]], giving two [[Vine]]s
